donts: Skip cool blue or neon tones
Don't use generic stock coffee imagery
Avoid glossy or highly reflective finishes
personality: Ember & Oat is a warm, craft-first small-batch coffee roaster that embodies the intimacy of hand-roasted beans and the comfort of the morning ritual. With a hand-drawn serif aesthetic and an earthy palette rooted in espresso and oat cream, the brand feels approachably artisanal—honoring traditional methods while maintaining a clean, modern sensibility. It celebrates the human element behind the craft, from the roaster's hands to the ceramic mug, creating a sensory, grounded experience that feels both authentic and refined.
